plugins.name: env-example-generator
plugins.description: Turn a .env into a shareable .env.example with keys preserved and values stripped.

plugins.name: license-picker
plugins.description: Generate a LICENSE file for your repo from a chosen license, name, and year.

plugins.name: markdown-table-formatter
plugins.description: Align messy Markdown tables and normalize their columns, or build a table from CSV.

plugins.name: robots-sitemap-validator
plugins.description: Check robots.txt and sitemap.xml for crawl-blocking mistakes.

plugins.name: todo-fixme-extractor
plugins.description: List every TODO, FIXME, HACK, XXX, and BUG comment in your code with file and line.

plugins.name: env-doctor-free
plugins.description: Diagnose local project environment issues that prevent apps from starting or running.

plugins.name: git-commit-writer-free
plugins.description: Generate conventional commit messages from staged git changes.

plugins.name: lead-enricher-free
plugins.description: Build enriched B2B lead profiles from a company URL, company name plus domain, or LinkedIn company URL.

plugins.name: outreach-writer-free
plugins.description: Generate personalized B2B cold emails from lead profiles.

plugins.name: pipeline-reporter-free
plugins.description: Generate pipeline reports from CRM CSV exports.

plugins.name: readme-generator-free
plugins.description: Generate polished README files from project code.
